gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 20.1.8, DRM 3.64, 6.16.3)
notes: Summary kinda says it all. The game launches, menus dither a lot with what looks like tons of reprojection and stuttering, then I launch into the game and the entire thing crashes. The game, SteamVR, and sometimes taking any desktop environment I use down with it. I've tried Glorious Eggroll and various other proton versions to no avail. Either the same result or it instantly stops working. My launch arguments help the menu render a little, but if I don't have them it doesn't even work at all.
title: Half-Life: Alyx
